conflict: The mainland records office treats char residents as already suspect, and the official systems on offer recognize fewer forms of kinship than the island has needed to survive.
consequence: Halima learns that a household-occupancy affidavit route exists, but it will require public testimony that exposes private histories.
must_land_beats: Travel off the char changes scale and shows the institutional contempt surrounding displacement.
The records office demonstrates that bureaucratic violence can be cold rather than loud.
Aminul's usefulness depends on what he can explain and what he cannot promise.
The affidavit route opens a path that is possible, expensive, and humiliating all at once.
objective: Find an administrative route that can protect households whose blood records will never reconcile cleanly.
